---
name: verify-nextjs-browser
description: Verify a rendered Next.js feature in a real browser with viewport, locale, theme, and interaction evidence.
agent: "Verifier"
argument-hint: "[feature or route area]"
---
Verify the rendered Next.js feature in a browser-aware way before delivery.

Follow:

- [AGENTS.md](../../AGENTS.md)
- [Next.js browser QA skill](../skills/nextjs-browser-qa/SKILL.md)
- [Next.js runtime debugging skill](../skills/nextjs-runtime-debugging/SKILL.md)
- [delivery validation skill](../skills/delivery-validation/SKILL.md)

Required output:

1. Routes verified
2. Browser or MCP tools used
3. Evidence by viewport, locale, and theme
4. Issues found or clean bill of health
5. Delivery readiness
